problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: Combining Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
